title: The Sufi Message of Hazrat Inayat Khan: The Art of Personality
author: Hazrat Inayat Khan
description: It is never too soon in the life of a child for it to receive education. The soul of an infant is like a photographic plate which has never been exposed before, and whatever impression falls on that photographic plate covers it. No other impressions which come afterwards have the same effect. Theref
